sales_replies.intent: Customer is negotiating price, asking for discount, or objecting to price.
sales_replies.approved_reply: Boleh kita, harga ani memang promo sudah ya. Kalau kita ready, saya boleh bantu lock harga promo ani dulu.

sales_replies.intent: Customer wants to think first, ask someone first, or decide later.
sales_replies.approved_reply: Boleh kita, no worries. Kalau ada apa-apa soalan sebelum decide, boleh tanya saja ya.

sales_replies.intent: Customer is interested but wants to wait for payday, salary, budget, or pay later.
sales_replies.approved_reply: Faham kita. Kalau tunggu payday, no worries ya. Bila kita ready nanti, boleh message kami semula.

sales_replies.intent: Customer says the product, package, or delivery is too expensive.
sales_replies.approved_reply: Faham kita. Harga ani memang ikut promo/package yang ada sekarang ya, supaya kita dapat value yang lebih berbaloi.

sales_replies.intent: Customer politely says not interested, not now, or next time.
sales_replies.approved_reply: Baik kita, no worries. Kalau berminat nanti, boleh message kami semula ya.
